resultList.dtldesc: Introducing a splendid 3 BHK villa for sale in the peaceful neighborhood of Rajanukunte, Bangalore. Its north-facing orientation ensures ample natural light and ventilation, creating a bright and airy living environment.::::::Property specifications and facilities::::::This elegant villa boasts a generous super built-up area of 2741 square feet and sits on a spacious plot spanning 2525 square feet. The villa comes semi-furnished with all bedrooms featuring wardrobes, and lights and fans installed in every room.::::::The ground floor comprises a servant room, a welcoming hall, one bedroom, and a bathroom (attached). The modern modular kitchen is equipped with cabinets, a granite platform, and a sink, complete with a utility area for added convenience.::::::The first floor houses two more bedrooms, each with attached bathrooms. Accessible via internal stairs, an open terrace adds to the charm of this villa. All bathrooms are designed in a Western style and include geysers for your comfort. The entire house features a warm and inviting wooden flooring.::::::Residents can enjoy the convenience of one covered parking space, 24-hour water supply, and a 100% power backup facility. This villa is part of the BCIL project, offering security with a dedicated guard and CCTV surveillance.::::::Locality::::::The property is strategically located with schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets all within a 1-kilometer radius. Public transport options are easily accessible, and banks/ATMs are conveniently located nearby. For those relying on the railway, Yelahanka Station is just a short distance away.
